reviews.comment:
Hace más de 20 años que voy a cargar combustible, siempre me atendieron muy bien! Excelentes empleados

(Translated by Google)
I've been going there to fill up my tank for over 20 years, and they've always treated me very well! Excellent employees.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyb1kzdnJ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atencion en playa. Ahora un paquete de masitas y un jugo es mas caro que llenar un tanque de combustible.  No recomiendo comprar viveres , muy caros.

(Translated by Google)
Good service at the beach. Now a pack of pastries and a juice costs more than filling up a gas tank. I don't recommend buying groceries; they're very expensive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMycnBDWXdRRRAB

reviews.comment:
El bolsón es una hermosa localidad
Esta la ciudad en sí que ha mejorado mucho
Tiene en pleno centro una hermosa plaza
Muy arreglada y cuidada
Tiene cerca a Lago Púelo y también la pequeña localidad del Hoyo
Donde es un fértil valle muy grande   , donde suelen plantarse fruta fina y hacer mermeladas que venden a otros lugares de argentina y del mundo
Sobresalen las mermeladas y envasados “ del Monje”

(Translated by Google)
El Bolsón is a beautiful town.
The town itself has improved a lot. Right in the center, it has a beautiful plaza, very well-maintained and cared for. Nearby are Lago Puelo and the small town of El Hoyo, which is a large, fertile valley where they grow berries and make jams that are sold to other parts of Argentina and the world. The jams and preserves from "El Monje" are particularly noteworthy.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXLTZfWXRnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Un desastre los baños  pase 2 veces y diferentes horarios y los baños son realmente un asco. La atención bien y los productos como en cualquier lado.

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms are a disaster. I went twice, at different times, and they're truly disgusting. The service was fine, and the products are the same as anywhere else.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXbTdEV29RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Horrible, no paren, para entrar a los baños solo con botas y máscara de oxígeno. Una vergüenza que el ACA no tome medidas.  Vayan a la Puma de enfrente.

(Translated by Google)
Horrible, don't stop, only wearing boots and an oxygen mask to enter the restroom. It's a shame the ACA isn't taking action. Go to the Puma across the street.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXa2Y2TXd3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Es increíble que una estación de servicio del acá tenga los baños en el estado que están en esta estación de servicio. Fuimos dos veces una estaban clausurados y la otra directamente no se podía entrar de lo sucios que estaban. Realmente el acá debería revisar está estación de servicio. Nunca me ofrecieron otros sanitarios interiores como dice el propietario

(Translated by Google)
It's unbelievable that a gas station here has restrooms in such a state. We went twice; once they were closed, and the other time they were so filthy you couldn't even enter. The authorities really need to inspect this station. They never offered me any alternative restrooms inside, as the owner claims.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXaUtHRkpREAE
